ddls:
CREATE TABLE "error_types" (
  "error_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error type */,
  "error_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the error type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error type */,
  "parent_error_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent error type (for hierarchical error categorization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_types_parent_error_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_error_type_id") REFERENCES error_types ("error_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applications" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the application */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Description of the application */,
  "app_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was created */,
  "app_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the application was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_environments" (
  "env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that the environment belongs to */,
  "env_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "env_description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "env_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was created */,
  "env_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_environments_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, DevOps engineer, admin) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined */,
  "last_active_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the error event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application that generated the error */,
  "env_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the error occurred */,
  "error_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error type */,
  "method" TEXT /* HTTP method that triggered the error */,
  "path" TEXT /* URL path that triggered the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* Client IP address that triggered the error */,
  "error" TEXT /* Error message or description */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_error_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_type_id") REFERENCES error_types ("error_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES applications ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_env_id FOREIGN KEY ("env_id") REFERENCES application_environments ("env_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that the log belongs to */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Detailed information about the error, including platform, operating system, and error message */,
  "log_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error log was created */,
  "log_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_snapshots" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error snapshot */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that the snapshot belongs to */,
  "snapshot_data" TEXT /* Detailed snapshot of the error, including platform, operating system, and error message */,
  "snapshot_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error snapshot was created */,
  "snapshot_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error snapshot was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_snapshots_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error version */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the error */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the error version */,
  "version_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error version was created */,
  "version_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_versions_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "comment_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_comments_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that the assignment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was assigned the error */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was assigned */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., 'open', 'in_progress', 'resolved') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_assignments_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that the resolution belongs to */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the error resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_resolutions_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "platform_version" TEXT /* Version of the platform */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operating system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operating system */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operating system */,
  "os_description" TEXT /* Description of the operating system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)
